content: I recently graduated with a B.S. Data Science (Spring 2021) from UC San Diego.

Most recently, I worked as a Website Administrator at the Halicioglu Data Science Institute, where I managed HDSI's website and web projects. Previously, I have worked on front-end Native Android development (using Java) and back-end development (using AWS) for a small virtual assistant based startup.
I also have worked extensively with HTML/CSS, JavaScript, and WordPress. Additionally, I have worked with Java and the Android SDK.
